Welcome to the Legacy Coaching Program. Super excited to have you, Jim Lourdes here. Let's get right into the overview. What is the Legacy Coaching Program? Why do we have it for a gym that has 75 members and maybe 20 challengers at a time? We'll call it gym A. And it's much different than doing it for a gym that has 375 members and 120 challengers. We'll call that gym B, okay? So as an example, if each conversation takes five minutes, that is a difference of 475 minutes or eight hours per week for gym A versus 2,475 minutes or 41 hours per week for gym B. Gym A, the owner might be able to do it at that time. In fact, they probably would. Gym B, at that point, you'd probably want a retention manager because that almost seems like a full-time job to hold clients accountable so they have that same level of service. Now, those conversations, they still need to happen, right? Or the members, they won't be happy with the accountability that you're providing. So that's where a coach who has been where you are is going to help you run the most efficient and effective system based on your volume or membership level. So weekly reach-outs and weekly forms will cover how you're going to be doing that. It is super simple. You just send in a form from your cell phone once a week, reporting some KPIs or some key performance indicators that your coaches need so they can help get you to the next level. So we'll cover how that works. Working with the coaching coordinators. So the coaches do have coaching coordinators that are with gym launch that help them execute all the plans and help them do everything. So how do you work with them? How does that look like? We're going to have a lesson on that. And then finally, power rankings. So power rankings is something cool that we are using to create different leaderboards based on where a gym should be. So what are power rankings and how do you get high in the power rankings? We're going to go over that in a lesson. And then finally, masterminds. So we are going to have masterminds twice a year where you get together with your coaches and other coaching classes and other coaching groups. And we are going to be going over tactical, how to just absolutely crush it at your gym. And those are going to be really cool. Those are in-person. So all of this stuff will be covered in the course. And so with that being said, the next thing to do is let's dive in.
